difficulty.reason: Very hardy, tolerates neglect, dramatic dinosaur-skin texture fascinates children

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Small seedlings with round seed leaves

prompt.en: Can you find the baby kale plants? They have tiny round leaves!
prompt.da: Kan du finde baby-groenkaalsplanterne? De har bittesmaa runde blade!

growth_stages.name: Leaf Development
growth_stages.look_for: Dark bumpy leaves growing in a rosette -- looks like dinosaur skin!

prompt.en: Run your finger over the bumpy leaves -- they feel like dinosaur skin!
prompt.da: Koer din finger hen over de bumpede blade -- de foeles som dinosaurhud!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Lower leaves are large enough to pick (15-20cm long)

prompt.en: Snap off the BIG bottom leaves -- leave the small ones at the top growing!
prompt.da: Knaek de STORE nederste blade af -- lad de smaa i toppen vokse videre!

human_readable.en: Water regularly but tolerates some drought. Prefers consistently moist soil.
human_readable.da: Vand regelmaessigt, men taaler lidt toerke. Foretraekker jaevnt fugtig jord.

harvest.notes: Pick-and-come-again: harvest lower leaves, plant keeps producing. Flavor improves after light frost.

companion_plants.notes: Borage and calendula attract beneficial insects. Nasturtium acts as aphid trap crop.

message.en: Kale could use some water -- leaves may get bitter if too dry.
message.da: Groenkaalen kunne bruge lidt vand -- bladene kan blive bitre, hvis den er for toer.
